add_pictures_hint: More pictures give a more accurate result
avatar_description: Illustration of a man taking a picture
certainty_text: Artsorakel found %1$d%% similarity with %2$s, based on what it has learned. The Artificial Intelligence can be wrong, so check for yourself if the identification is correct.
certainty_text_with_location: Artsorakel found %1$d%% similarity with %2$s, based on what it has learned. The Artificial Intelligence can be wrong, so check for yourself if the identification is correct.
clear_history_confirmation_message: Are you sure you want to clear all identification history? This action cannot be undone.
crop_hint: Drag and zoom until the species fills the square
delete_item_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
distribution_map_description: Map showing where this species has been reported in Norway
identification_error: Failed to identify species. Please check your internet connection and try again.
image_preview_description: Fullscreen preview of the selected image
read_more_detailed: Read more about %1$s at Artsdatabanken (in Norwegian)
report_dialog_message: Check the identification yourself before reporting. Artsorakel can be wrong also with a high similarity percentage. Do you want to continue?
report_upload_failed: Failed to upload images. Please try again.
save_history_desc: Keep identification results in device history
sub_title: The app only recognizes wild species (no humans, pets, etc).
timeout_message: This is taking longer than usual…
use_location_for_id_desc: Sharing the approximate location of pictures can improve results by selecting the best model. If switched off, the location will not be shared.
warning_partial_access_no_location: Need full access to read location
